weapons.name: Admonimortis
weapons.abilities: AT(3), Slow(-1). Unique. Dread Host only.

weapons.name: Paragon Spear
weapons.abilities: AT(1), Quick(+1). Unique. Emperor's Chosen only.

equipment.name: Halo of the Torchbearer
equipment.desc: This model gains the "Magnificent Gleam" weapon. It and its attached unit gains the "Move Through Cover" ability. Unique. Emmissaries Imperatus only.

equipment.name: Praesidius
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Stealth" ability. Unique. Aquilan Shield only.

equipment.name: Stasis Oubliette
equipment.desc: Enemy units engaged with this model get -3 Initiative. Unique. Shadowkeepers only.

equipment.name: Swiftsilver Talon
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit gains the "Hit and Run" ability. Unique. Solar Watch only.
